ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag. Card is a narrative Action card depicting ships and seas with no named character.

trivia_bullets.text: Azurite Sea is the sixth Disney Lorcana set, released November 15, 2024. The set's central conceit is players following an ancient map into an uncharted location called the Azurite Sea — a newly coined Lorcana-original location, not drawn from any specific Disney film, though populated with characters from across the Disney catalog including first appearances from Big Hero 6 and Rescue Rangers. The Enchanted-rarity cards are designed to look like aged nautical maps and guidebooks. [lorcana.gg: Azurite Sea set page; LorcanaPlayer.com: Azurite Sea set reveal]

Flavor text: "You need a good plan and even better luck to make it across these treacherous waters." The speaker is unnamed — a maxim-style warning rather than attributed dialogue. `[Lorcana card frontmatter / LorcanaPlayer.com card page]`

Sail the Azurite Sea is a 2-cost Sapphire Action that lets you ink an additional card this turn AND draw a card — a double-function ramp spell. Competitive Sapphire lists run four copies as a core engine piece, often alongside Tipo – Growing Son, to achieve four ink by turn 3 and skip the usual three-cost slot. When paired with Oswald the Lucky Rabbit (who can play items for free), the draw-plus-ink value compounds further. The card is considered a staple of Sapphire ramp archetypes. [LorcanaPlayer.com: Azurite Sea Starter Deck review; ScreenRant: 10 Best Azurite Sea Cards]
sources: LorcanaPlayer.com Azurite Sea starter deck review

trivia_bullets.text: Illustrated by Valerio Buonfantino. The card is a Common with a foil variant that has appeared on eBay and Walmart listings. No named Disney characters appear in the art — the composition is pure nautical scene-setting, consistent with Azurite Sea's emphasis on voyage and discovery over character portraiture. `[Card frontmatter; Lorcana.gg card database; eBay listing]`

related_cards.name: Tipo - Growing Son
related_cards.note: Standard competitive pairing with Sail the Azurite Sea for turn-3 four-ink acceleration in Sapphire ramp

related_cards.name: Oswald the Lucky Rabbit
related_cards.note: His free-item ability compounds Sail the Azurite Sea's value when both are in play

related_cards.name: Sword in the Stone
related_cards.note: 163 neighbor in the same set; Azurite Sea card 163 is Sail the Azurite Sea, card 136 is Sword in the Stone — both in Sapphire color family
